PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Scaparotti for and with Peter Born.

The Court will grant the Petition for Instructions on the condition that the verification is filed, that a corrected/completed Proof of Service is filed and that a revised order is submitted/provided (subect to review/receipt of the order and filing of the above said documents). If the above is not completed by May 22, 2012, the matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
